property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate Add to Cart functionality and pricing for a Nutrition product", "Validate Add to Cart functionality"](1)

discount : 120 &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mThe cart should display the correct selling price, MRP, discount and total price&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.AddToCartStep.validate_selling_price_discount_mrp()&amp#27;[0m

SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details. Jul 07, 2026 1:12:13 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 149 Jul 07, 2026 1:12:13 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 149.0.7827.198. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.39.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate Nutrition products using Price and Brand filters", "Validating price and brand by filter functionality"](2)

testcase.system-err: Jul 07, 2026 1:13:26 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 149 Jul 07, 2026 1:13:26 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 149.0.7827.198. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.39.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
